excerpts.excerpt:
RICK
Hope we get invited to Tatum's first
birthday party.
Rick nods. Fred lets out a scream.
FRED
Caliente!
Johnson's nanny looks at Fred. Fred turns and screams at
the kids on the monkey bars.
FRED (CONT ID)
Boys, be careful, the monkey bars
are very hot. Muy caliente.
Johnson's nanny bends down to help the baby walk. She reveals
an incredible cleavage. Rick glazes over in lust.
FRED (CONT ID)
I'm thirsty.
Rick is so focused on Johnson's nanny he's not paying
attention to how hard he's pushing Emma on the swing .
EMMA
Daddy! Too high!
SLO-MO as everyone at the park turns to the screaming Emma.
Rick can't hear her in his Johnson nanny world.
EMMA (CONT ID)
Daddy!
Rick unknowingly gives Emma another hard push.

RICK (CONT' DJ
Daddy needs a bedtime story from
Mommy too.
MAGGIE
(whispers)
You got five minutes.
Maggie smiles and walks out.
KERRY
What kind of bedtime stories does
Mommy tell you?
RICK
Ones with happy endings.
Kerry smiles and cuddles up to her dad.
INT. KIDS' BEDROOM -- NIGHT
Kerry's finally asleep and Rick carefully separates himself
from her. He tiptoes out of the room. Just as he makes it
to the door, Emma cries out.
EMMA
Daddy!
Rick tiptoes quickly over to Ero.ma .
RICK
What honey?

Script provided for educational purposes. More scripts can be found here: http://www.sellingyourscreenplay.com/library

FRED (CONT'D)
Trust me, that doesn't just slip
out. Maggie's setting a trap.
RICK
It was too random to be a trap.
FRED
She's wily like a fur trapper.
RICK
She said it in passing. I doubt she
meant it. She was half asleep.
FRED
Which means she was half awake.
RICK
I don't know.
FRED
My advice. She says it again and
you got the greenlight.
RICK
I can't do it. I'm not that guy.
FRED
Of course you're not that guy. But
step up to the plate man. For all
of us. Hold this.

MAGGIE
But what if he has sex with another
woman?
LUCY
He won't.
GRACE
But if he does?
LUCY
Then he would have anyway. Sooner
or later.
Lucy runs off to check the shot with a wider lens.
GRACE
You realize you're taking the advice
of a Hollywood commercial director
who's been married three times?
Maggie nods.
Script provided for educational purposes. More scripts can be found here: http://www.sellingyourscreenplay.com/library

MAGGIE
I know. But it doesn't make her wrong.
Grace puts her arm around Maggie.
MARK, blond streaked hair, killer body, SPEEDO, flirtatious.

INT. VICTORIA SECRETS -- DAY
Rick watches as another shopper browses the bra and panty section. Rick winks at Fred and moves in.
RICK
I don't think you should go with
that.
SHOPPER 2
Why not?
Rick's face goes blank. Panic mode!
RICK
cause you're hot and if I can't have you, nobody should have you, which
means I have to kill you .
Rick smiles weakly.
Script provided for educational purposes. More scripts can be found here: http://www.sellingyourscreenplay.com/library

EXT. VICTORIA SECRETS -- DAY
Rick and Fred being thrown out of the store.
FRED
Serial killer? You thought channeling
a serial killer would be charming?
Fred smacks Rick.
INT. MALL -- DAY
Fred walks up to the hot dog stand inside the food court.
He motions to Rick to watch and listen. A woman walking
with her friends takes a bite of her foot long hot dog as
she walks past Fred.

Maggie leaving early.
Rick taking the girls to school.
Rick working.
Maggie working.
Rick putting the kids to bed.
Maggie leaving early.
Rick working out.
Rick seeing Leigh at the coffee shop.
Maggie coming home to find Rick sleeping with Emma.
Maggie leaving early.
EXT. MANSION -- DAY
Maggie holds the schedule in her hands as she approaches
Grace and Lucy.
MAGGIE
Should be an easy afternoon.
Script provided for educational purposes. More scripts can be found here: http://www.sellingyourscreenplay.com/library

GRACE
Establishing shots and inserts.
LUCY
You coming with me tonight to
Garrett's Lonely Hearts Club Party?
MAGGIE
No need. It seems my plan worked.

Rick nods. Fred hugs Rick.
FRED (CONT'D)
Thank God.
Fred squeezes Rick tighter.
FRED (CONT ID)
I'm gonna pull back the curtain for
a second. I wanted our families to
grow old together, and after a long,
happy, faithful life, you and I ...
Fred smacks his hands loud.
FRED (CONT ID)
Die together. Saving kittens or
something. And then we meet God and
God says to us "I made all these
beautiful women and you two decided
to each stay faithful to one! Why?"
And then I fall into your arms and
cry for all eternity.
Wannabe, the punk artist from the coffee shop, walks outside.
WANNABE
~ey!
Rick turns around.
